calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Continued To Mar-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Rothstein for Linda Holmes (Executor).

Mr. Rothstein stated they have resolved most of the issues, that he received a settlement proposal which includes a waiver of account, that he is in the process of reviewing it and that he expects to get the petition for final distribution filed in the next six weeks or so. The status report was continued to March 24, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Saephan. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-27-2015 Continued To Feb-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-09-2014 Continued To Jan-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Rothstein for Linda Holmes (Executor).

Mr. Rothstein stated that Mr. Boessenecker was unable to appear, that they have been in communication, that they have narrowed it down to seven issues and that they would like to see if they can resolve them in a non traditional manner. The status report was continued to January 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that the parties have either worked things out or the Court will give them a deadline for filing of a petition for final distribution.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Continued To Dec-09-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
